title: Cross sections for the Li-6(p,He-3)He-4 reaction at energies between 0.1 and 3.0 MeV.

x4freetext: Cross sections for the Li-6(p,He-3)He-4 reaction at
energies between 0.1 and 3.0 MeV.

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Physical Review, Part C, Nuclear Physics, Vol.20, p.1984 (1979)

x4freetext: Thin films of LiF enriched to
99.3% in 6Li, evaporated on 10 ug/cm2 carbon foils

x4codes.hlp: Argonne National Laboratory, Argonne, IL, United States of America

x4freetext: Collimated Si surface-barrier detectors thick
enough to completely stop the reaction products; two
were mounted on movable arms within the chamber, while
a third fixed at a back angle, served as a monitor in
the angular distribution measurements.
Uncertainty in target thickness

x4freetext: Normalization to a separately
measured absolute excitation function obtained
at 50. degr.
For the angular distribution measurements below 1 MeV
the LiF targets thicknesses of 25 ug/cm2 were used.
data were obtained from the 3He yields
data were obtained from the He yield by use of
appropriate kinematic relationships,

x4code.headerHelp: Error in value of quantity, defined under ERR-ANALYS

x4freetext: Relative uncertainties which vary from about
10% at a few angles at the lowest energies to about 2%
at some higher energies, and are typically 3-5%.
